notes: Recognizably this specific squid in the same flared-fins pose with both long tentacles and the splayed arm crown, rendered with restrained FAO-style linework but the arms lack differentiation and the stipple looks scattered rather than tied to chromatophore fields.
specific_issues: arm crown reads as a chunky undifferentiated mass rather than 8 individually drawn arms
no ring-shaped suckers along arms or tentacular clubs
eye is a minimal dot rather than the clear almond+pupil seen in FAO plates
stipple is randomly scattered rather than concentrated in the orange chromatophore field on the dorsal mantle
stray stipple dots appear outside the silhouette outline
tentacular club tips lack the toothed/suckered detail visible in the photo
fin edge on the left is slightly lumpy/undulating rather than the smooth rhomboid in the photo
